revision.text: '''栗原神社（栗原神社）''' *[[栗原神社]] - [[岐阜県]][[高山市]]上宝町にある神社。 *[[栗原神社(神奈川県)]] - [[神奈川県]][[座間市]]栗原中央にある神社。 {{aimai}}

revision.comment: +同名
+改名提案
LearningBox がページ「[[栗原神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]」を「[[栗原神社]]」に移動しました：[[WP:RM]] 2012-05-19T06:34:35‎ (UTC) 依頼分
移動済みにつき -{{改名提案}}
リンクを絞る
東大阪市と真庭市の栗原神社を追加
revision.text:
'''栗原神社'''（くりはらじんじゃ）は、
*[[栗原神社 (座間市)]] - 神奈川県座間市栗原中央鎮座 *[[栗原神社 (高山市)]] - 岐阜県高山市上宝町鎮座 *[[栗原神社 (東大阪市)]] - [[大阪府]][[東大阪市]]吉原鎮座 *[[栗原神社 (真庭市)]] - [[岡山県]][[真庭市]]栗原鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:くりはらしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11535864]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) refers to several Shinto shrines in Japan:

* {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Zama)|ja|栗原神社 (座間市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Zama)|qq=}} - Located in Kurihara-Chūō, Zama City, Kanagawa Prefecture.
* {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Takayama)|ja|栗原神社 (高山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Takayama)|qq=}} - Located in Kamitakara, Takayama City, Gifu Prefecture.
* {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Higashiōsaka)|ja|栗原神社 (東大阪市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Higashiōsaka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yoshihara, Higashiōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture.
* {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|栗原神社 (真庭市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Maniwa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kurihara, Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture.

{{disambiguation}}

{{citation needed|ja|栗原神社|version=42566856|comment=Imported full ja history}}

* {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Zama)|ja|栗原神社 (座間市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Zama)|qq=}} - Located in Kurihara-Chūō, Zama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Takayama)|ja|栗原神社 (高山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Takayama)|qq=}} - Located in Kamitakara, Takayama City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Higashiōsaka)|ja|栗原神社 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Higashiōsaka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yoshihara, Higashiōsaka City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kurihara Shrine (Maniwa)|ja|栗原神社 (真庭市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Shrine (Maniwa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kurihara, Maniwa City, Okayama Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}
